title: THSI Static Scientific Graph Node
description: Schema for a typed node in the THSI Static Scientific Evidence Graph v0.1. Clinical diagnosis nodes are forbidden.

node_id.description: Unique slug identifier matching edge source_node/target_node values.

domain.description: Primary evidence domain inferred from connected edges.

description.description: Conservative explanation of the node's role in the graph.

allowed_as_input.description: True when the node may originate from observations or feature extraction.

allowed_as_output.description: True when the node may be an inference output (mechanism, bridge, risk, or state hypothesis).

clinical_diagnosis.description: Must always be false in v0.1; no clinical diagnosis nodes.

created_from_edges.description: edge_id values where this node appears as source_node or target_node.
